task: Find the most experienced real estate agent in St Augustine, FL, and open his or her profile page.
graderReasoning: The agent navigated to RE/MAX agent search, filtered to Saint Augustine, FL, opened the sort menu, selected 'Experience (High to Low)', and then opened the top result's profile page. The final page shown is Thomas Dorazil’s RE/MAX profile at https://www.remax.com/real-estate-agents/thomas-dorazil-st-augustine-fl/102478332, and the profile explicitly displays '54 Years Experience.' This satisfies finding the most experienced agent in St Augustine, FL and opening the profile page.
final_result_response: Done. I opened Thomas Dorazil’s RE/MAX profile page. He is listed with 54 years of experience in St Augustine, FL.
action_history: Opening RE/MAX: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.remax.com/');
Closing popup and reading page: await page.locator('e3').click();
Opening Find an Agent search: await page.locator('e9').click();
Going to agent finder: await page.locator('e162').click();
Searching agents in St Augustine: await page.locator('e13').fill('St Augustine, FL');
Applying St Augustine location: await page.locator('e244').click();
Checking all agents, not just photo profiles: await page.locator('e22').click();
Opening top experienced agent profile: await page.locator('e25').click();

screenshots.title: Checking all agents, not just photo profiles
